description: Evals for S6 dv-sequences: directed/random vseq generation, test class generation, checker ID embedding, interactive testcase creation

test_cases.name: APB-UART: generate directed tests from testplan + S5 TB data
test_cases.description: Full flow: dv_tb_data.json from S5 (apb_uart project) + testplan with 4 directed rows. Tests: vseq file layout, test class plusargs, CHK_ID embedding, packages.

testplan_rows.testcase_description:
DUT Config: UART_CTRL.TX_EN=0
Stimulus: APB write to UART_CTRL
Expected Behavior: write accepted
Checks: UART_CTRL readback matches
Pass Criteria: readback == written value

DUT Config: default
Stimulus: APB read from UART_STATUS
Expected Behavior: STATUS returned
Checks: prdata valid
Pass Criteria: prdata matches mirror

DUT Config: UART_CTRL.TX_EN=1
Stimulus: send UART byte 0xA5
Expected Behavior: TXD line frames byte
Checks: TXD observed
Pass Criteria: TXD matches 0xA5 frame

DUT Config: UART_CTRL.TX_EN=1
Stimulus: random UART bytes
Expected Behavior: all bytes transmitted
Checks: scoreboard byte comparison
Pass Criteria: 0 mismatches

assertions.description: Agent sequences generated: apb/ and UART/ directories with write/read/send/recv ops
assertions.check: dv/sequences/APB/apb_write_seq.sv exists AND dv/sequences/APB/apb_read_seq.sv exists AND dv/sequences/UART/uart_send_seq.sv exists

assertions.description: Base vseq generated with ral_write/ral_read/ral_check tasks and uvm_declare_p_sequencer
assertions.check: dv/sequences/apb_uart/apb_uart_base_vseq.sv contains uvm_declare_p_sequencer AND ral_write AND ral_check AND apb_uart_virtual_seqr

assertions.description: Directed vseq generated for each directed testcase row with CHK_ID embedded
assertions.check: apb_reg_write_test_vseq.sv exists AND contains CHK_UART_APB_PROTOCOL_001 AND uart_tx_basic_test_vseq.sv exists AND contains CHK_UART_TX_FUNCTIONAL_001

assertions.description: Random vseq generated for uart_tx_rand_test with num_txns constraint and repeat loop
assertions.check: uart_tx_rand_test_vseq.sv contains rand int unsigned num_txns AND constraint c_defaults AND repeat (num_txns)

assertions.description: Test classes generated: one per testplan row, extend base_test, have plusargs block
assertions.check: apb_uart_apb_reg_write_test_test.sv extends apb_uart_base_test AND contains $test$plusargs AND raise_objection AND drop_objection

assertions.description: Assertion code from testplan embedded in uart_tx_basic_test_vseq with CHK_ID
assertions.check: uart_tx_basic_test_vseq.sv contains p_uart_tx_start OR contains CHK_UART_TX_FUNCTIONAL_001

assertions.description: sequences_pkg and tests_pkg generated, import correct sub-packages
assertions.check: apb_uart_sequences_pkg.sv contains import apb_vip_pkg AND import uart_vip_pkg AND apb_uart_tests_pkg.sv contains import apb_uart_sequences_pkg

assertions.description: compile.f updated with sequences and tests package entries
dv_sequences_data.json written with correct test count and milestone breakdown
assertions.check: dv_sequences_data.json contains project_name=apb_uart AND summary.total_tests=4 AND summary.dv_i=2 AND summary.dv_c=2

test_cases.name: STOP if dv_tb_data.json missing — prompt user
test_cases.description: No dv_tb_data.json provided. Skill must stop and present the 3-option prompt. Tests the mandatory gate check.

assertions.description: Skill output contains STOPPED message and 3 options (1/2/3)
assertions.check: skill output contains 'S6 STOPPED' AND 'dv_tb_data.json' AND 'Options:' AND '1.' AND '2.' AND '3.'

assertions.description: Skill does not generate any .sv files before user responds
assertions.check: no .sv files written before user responds to the STOP prompt

test_cases.name: Interactive: generate single testcase from user description
test_cases.description: User describes a testcase in natural language. Skill asks clarifying questions (all in one message), then generates vseq + test class for that one testcase only.

input.user_description: Write a test that enables TX, sends 5 bytes over UART, and checks STATUS.TX_FULL never asserts

assertions.description: Skill asks clarifying questions in a single message before generating any file
assertions.check: skill output contains clarification question block (test name, agents, config, pass criteria, milestone) BEFORE any SV code

assertions.description: After user responds OK, vseq file generated references UART_CTRL write and UART_STATUS check
assertions.check: generated vseq contains uart_ctrl OR UART_CTRL AND uart_status OR UART_STATUS

assertions.description: Generated test class has correct base class and plusargs
assertions.check: generated test extends apb_uart_base_test AND contains $test$plusargs
